title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE GUTAD ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF FLORIDABLANCA, PROVINCE OF PAMPANGA, TO ATANACIO PANGAN ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 3792 / 59 OG No. 35, 5723 (September 2, 1963)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3577, June 21, 1963 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE GUTAD ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF FLORIDABLANCA, PROVINCE OF PAMPANGA, TO ATANACIO PANGAN ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Gutad Elementary School in the Municipality of Floridablanca, Province of Pampanga, is hereby changed to Atanacio Pangan Elementary School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 21, 1963.
